available_margin.description: Pre-multiplied margin basis available for new risk. Instrument-specific purchasing power must be derived from this and margin rate.

cash_excess.description: Withdrawable cash only. Never use this as risk buffer or buying-power basis.

equity.description: Total account equity / net liquidation value in quote currency.

excess_liquidity.description: Maintenance-margin risk buffer. Compute as `max(0, margin_balance - maintenance_margin_requirement)` when both inputs are trustworthy and same-currency; otherwise `None`.

position_margin.description: Margin requirement from open positions only.

positions.description: map from TradableProduct to a list of AccountPosition

realized_pnl.description: Cumulative realized PnL since start of current trading day/session.

total_margin.description: Margin requirement including open positions and working orders.
